name: fe_03_04256
context_text: <A> older boy in college asked me out the same night and i ended up breaking the date with the guy that was in the hospital that was another thing i wish i would have not have done because i thought that was pretty pretty awful of me 'cause i just called and told his parents that { i } / <B> [ uh-huh ] / <A> wasn't going to be able to go { and } / <B> [ yeah ] / <A> um that i was so sorry and he had already told all his friends he was so excited he was going to go this college party and / <B> wow / <A> when he got out of the hospital and oh it was just bad so not only did i feel like i'd let him down after spending so much time with him but that i'd let down my other friend { who } / <B> [ mhm ]
